channel.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário

item.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário
item.description:
🚨 Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica
Visão geral:
• 2 com severidade Crítica
• 12 com severidade Alta
• 13 novas CVEs
• 3 novos advisories/exploits

────────────────────────────────────
Infraestrutura - Docker / ESX / Elastic / Grafana / Nginx / VMware / Zabbix

🚨 CVE-2026-54350 - Elastic
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Elastic
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 10.0
Resumo:
Budibase is an open-source low-code platform. Prior to 3.39.12, an unauthenticated visitor of any published Budibase app reads every document of the backing MongoDB, CouchDB, Elasticsearch, DynamoDB-PartiQL, or REST-with-JSON-body collection and, where the builder has published a PUBLIC write query, modifies every document of that collection with one HTTP request. enrichContext at packages/server/src/sdk/workspace/qu...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-54350
 
🚨 CVE-2026-54092 - Docker
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 6.5
Resumo:
File Browser is a file managing interface for uploading, deleting, previewing, renaming, and editing files within a specified directory. Prior to 2.63.6, unchecked passwords maximums allow for an arbitrarily large password to be passed into the login API. This spikes CPU and memory, and after testing, crashes, heavily lags any container created, and has even made my docker daemon start to send errors with status code...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-54092
 
📰 The Complete Guide to Workload Mobility with VCF Operations HCX 9.1 (Part 1: Deployment)
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
Welcome to the step-by-step guide on how to deploy HCX Manager in VCF 9.1 and legacy environments. This post contains the full details and a video recording covering every step of the process. Key Points VCF Integrated Experience (NEW): VMware Cloud Foundation Operations HCX brings centralized deployment directly through the VCF 9.1 interface.
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/06/26/vcf-9-operations-hcx-deployment-part-1/
 
📰 EU Cyber Resilience Act: Overview, Requirements, and Timelines
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: https://www.docker.com/blog/feed/
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Learn what the EU Cyber Resilience Act requires, including SBOM mandates, vulnerability reporting, and compliance deadlines for container teams.
Link: https://www.docker.com/blog/eu-cyber-resilience-act-overview/
 
📰 USSFCU Secures Financial Data on a Sovereign Private Cloud
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: VMware
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Most financial institutions treat data security as a top priority. Senate and Capitol Hill community, data sovereignty is a core operational requirement. To enable advanced business intelligence (BI) and artificial intelligence (AI) capabilities, the United States Senate Federal Credit Union (USSFCU) recently modernized its data infrastructure.
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/tanzu/ussfcu-secures-financial-data-on-a-sovereign-private-cloud/
 
📰 From Instance to Fleet: Enterprise-Scale Service Management in Tanzu Platform 10.4
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 0.4
Resumo:
Picture this: Your application teams pushed 30 updates last quarter. Your on-call rotation has never been quieter. And somewhere, a platform engineer is still manually configuring connection strings and writing a wall of YAML for a Postgres instance in Region X.
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/tanzu/from-instance-to-fleet-enterprise-scale-service-management-in-tanzu-platform-10-4/
 
📰 What a TAM Really Does: Three Stories from the Field
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Because every customer’s environment is different, the work our VMWare Cloud Foundation Technical Adoption Managers (VCF TAMs) perform is customized to meet their business and IT objectives. In some cases, that means helping organizations modernize infrastructure while maintaining operational control. In others, it may involve identifying opportunities to reduce costs, improving performance, or mitigating risk.
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/06/25/what-a-tam-really-does-three-stories-from-the-field/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Segurança - Acronis / Axur / Check Point / Harmony SASE / Qualys / SentinelOne

🚨 New DirtyClone Linux Kernel Flaw Lets Local Users Gain Root via Cloned Packets
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 8.8
Resumo:
DirtyClone is a new Linux kernel privilege escalation in the DirtyFrag family. JFrog Security Research published a working exploit walkthrough for the flaw on June 25, the first public demonstration for this variant. Tracked as CVE-2026-43503 (CVSS 8.8), it lets a local user corrupt file-backed memory through a cloned network packet and gain root.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/new-dirtyclone-linux-kernel-flaw-lets.html
 
🚨 Amazon Q Developer Flaw Could Let Malicious Repos Run Code via MCP Configs
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 8.5
Resumo:
A high-severity flaw in Amazon Q Developer let a malicious repository run commands and steal a developer's cloud credentials. The path was short: a developer opens the repo, trusts the workspace, and Amazon Q does the rest. Tracked as CVE-2026-12957 (CVSS 8.5), the bug sat in how Amazon's AI coding assistant handled Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/amazon-q-developer-flaw-could-let.html
 
🚨 New Linux pedit COW Exploit Enables Root Access by Poisoning Cached Binaries
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A flaw in the Linux kernel's traffic-control subsystem can let a local unprivileged user gain root on affected systems. CVE-2026-46331, nicknamed "pedit COW," is an out-of-bounds write in the packet-editing action (act_pedit) that corrupts shared page-cache memory. A public, working exploit appeared within a day of the CVE assignment on June 16.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/new-linux-pedit-cow-exploit-enables.html
 
🚨 CVE-2026-57454 - Check Point
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 6.1
Resumo:
Vim is an open source, command line text editor. From 9.2.0320 until 9.2.0679, a crafted undo or swap file can store a virtual-text property whose offset and length point outside the line's property data. When Vim restores or displays such a line it converts the offset into a pointer and reads the virtual text without bounds checking, causing an out-of-bounds read that can crash Vim or disclose adjacent heap memory.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-57454
 
💣 CISA sets urgent deadline to fix Cisco flaw exploited in attacks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) is giving federal agencies until Sunday to patch a vulnerability in Cisco Unified Communications Manager Server that is being actively exploited.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/cisa-sets-urgent-deadline-to-fix-cisco-flaw-exploited-in-attacks/
 
📰 Order-tracking app Shop abused to push callback phishing attacks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Threat actors are increasingly abusing Shop, the order-tracking app from Shopify, by adding fake purchase receipts in users' order histories to trick them into providing sensitive data or installing remote access software.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/order-tracking-app-shop-abused-to-push-callback-phishing-attacks/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Sistemas / Cloud - 1Password / Azure / Office / Ubuntu / Windows Server / WordPress

🚨 CVE-2026-49984 - Windows Server
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Windows Server
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.7
Resumo:
Kestra is an open-source, event-driven orchestration platform. Prior to 1.0.45 and 1.3.23, the local internal-storage backend validates user-supplied paths for .. traversal before it converts Windows-style backslashes to forward slashes. An attacker can therefore smuggle a traversal sequence past the guard using backslashes (..\..\..\); the guard sees a harmless string, and the path is only rewritten to ../../../ aft...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-49984
 
🚨 CVE-2026-55412 - Azure
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Azure
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 8.3
Resumo:
ToolJet is the open-source foundation am AI-native platform for building and deploying internal tools, workflows and AI agents. Prior to 3.20.178-lts, there's an SSRF in the RestAPI data source component. The RestAPI data source executes HTTP requests server-side, and its private IP filter only checks the hostname string — not the resolved IP. DNS names like 169.254.169.254.nip.io resolve to the Azure IMDS link-local...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-55412
 
🚨 CVE-2023-37524 - Office
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.7
Resumo:
HCL Traveler for Microsoft Outlook (HTMO) is susceptible to vulnerabilities due to .NET Framework 4.5 being out of service. Since .NET Framework 4.5 has reached end-of-life and no longer receives security updates, it may expose the application to publicly known security weaknesses through vulnerable third-party components.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2023-37524
 
🚨 CVE-2025-59868 - Office
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 5.5
Resumo:
HCL Traveler for Microsoft Outlook (HTMO) is susceptible to a sensitive data exposure vulnerability which could allow an attacker to exploit application information to then attempt additional attacks and cause unknown behavior in the application.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-59868
 
🚨 CVE-2025-10268 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 5.3
Resumo:
The Printcart Web to Print Product Designer for WooCommerce WordPress plugin through 2.4.8 is vulnerable to path traversal which makes it possible for the attacker to retrieve the directory listing for arbitrary directories on the server.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-10268
 
🚨 CVE-2024-23581 - Office
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 6.7
Resumo:
The HCL Traveler for Microsoft Outlook libraries are being flagged as potentially malicious software or an unrecognized application.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-23581
 
🚨 CVE-2026-13226 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 6.5
Resumo:
The Groundhogg — CRM, Newsletters, and Marketing Automation plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to generic SQL Injection via the 'after' parameter in all versions up to, and including, 4.5.4 due to insufficient escaping on the user supplied parameter and lack of sufficient preparation on the existing SQL query. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Sales Manager-level access and above, to append add...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-13226
 
💣 New Linux pedit COW Exploit Allows Attackers to Gain System Root Access - CyberSecurityNews
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo Ubuntu. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
💣 New Linux pedit COW Exploit Enables Root Access by Poisoning Cached Binaries - The Hacker News
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo Ubuntu. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMif0FVX3lxTE9OUEtDRmFFUFFmRk5qUGtuUklzQ0xkYTVWWXhadEY5YUxrUDN0c1B3bWptTzRYSi1uZGNPT2dGTFItVUFaS1I0TUZPSWZqTFVwRnV1cXpxZ3pkTHVDRmg0RmxTWldjdmUyVG5aSWlDUEt5TUtTZzB2aEpiWWhHSDg?oc=5
 
📰 Challenges designers face in open source (and how to fix them)
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/blog/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A member of our team will be in touch shortly. Close Thank you for signing up for our newsletter! In these regular emails you will find the latest updates about Ubuntu and upcoming events where you can meet our team. Close Your preferences have been successfully updated. Close notification Please try again or file a bug report. Close Blog Open source software (OSS) is a cornerstone of modern technology. According to...
Link: https://ubuntu.com//blog/challenges-designers-face-in-open-source-and-how-to-fix-them
 
────────────────────────────────────
Período: Notícias dos dias 25/06/2026 e 26/06/2026.
